market_baseline: Bearish — SPY up slightly in premarket (+0.20% at $672.89) but futures hit by weak NFP data and geopolitical strikes in Iran; VIX up 16% to 27.54.

ai_word_of_the_day.definition: AI systems that can perform complex tasks autonomously with minimal human intervention, shifting from simple chatbots to autonomous teammates.

filtered_items.title: VIX Index Spikes +16% as Uncertainty Surges
filtered_items.summary: The VIX surged to 27.54 (+15.96%) reflecting a significant spike in market uncertainty following military strikes in Iran and disappointing employment data.

filtered_items.title: SPY Futures Sink on Weak NFP and Geopolitical Tension
filtered_items.summary: S&P 500 futures remain under pressure as weak Nonfarm Payrolls and rising oil prices from Iran strikes weigh on sentiment. SPY premarket at $672.89 (+0.20%).

filtered_items.title: Intel (INTC) Down on Regulatory Flags with Chinese Suppliers
filtered_items.summary: Intel shares fall 1.39% in premarket despite strong AI server demand, as US lawmakers raise national-security concerns regarding Chinese-linked supplier ties.

filtered_items.title: OpenAI signs Pentagon deal for Classified Network Deployment
filtered_items.summary: Altman confirms OpenAI will deploy models on the Pentagon's classified network, emphasizing that government must be more powerful than private companies. Move sparks controversy and internal tension.

filtered_items.title: Marty Cagan - Strategic PM Roles in the AI Era
filtered_items.summary: Cagan predicts strategic PM roles (discovery/strategy) will be essential while delivery-focused roles face automation. Mentions AI is now a 'fundamentally disrupting force'.

filtered_items.title: Lenny Rachitsky - High Context LLMs and Agentic AI
filtered_items.summary: Rachitsky outlines AI agents as tools to reduce PM 'busywork'. 2026 trends focus on 200k token context windows and multimodal capabilities transforming strategy and vision crafting.

filtered_items.title: OpenAI ChatGPT Retreat Boosts Expedia and Booking.com Stocks
filtered_items.summary: OpenAI's scale-back of direct booking within ChatGPT pushes transactions back to major OTAs like Expedia and Booking.com, alleviating disintermediation concerns in the travel industry.

filtered_items.title: Hoteliers Rapidly Moving Toward AI for Guest Ops by 2026
filtered_items.summary: Nearly 90% of hoteliers intend to deploy AI for messaging and revenue management by 2026. Contactless tech and smart room IoT integration are now industry table stakes.

filtered_items.title: Expedia Group Focuses on Conversions and PredictHQ Demand Signal
filtered_items.summary: Expedia partners with PredictHQ to leverage event-based demand signals for lodging partners, especially for massive events like FIFA World Cup 2026. Focus shifts to site speed metrics.
